div.p: Payment Reverse becomes a distribution operation. Instead of simply canceling the payment, the user can redirect the reversed amount to one or more customers, and optionally allocate specific amounts to specific liabilities. The system will validate that the total distributed amount matches the original payment amount before completing the operation.
